title: Subtract on a number line
description: Practice subtracting numbers like 784 and 391 using a number line. All numbers are less than 1000.
topic_path: Module 2: Place value and problem solving with units of measure
Topic E: Two- and three-digit measurement subtraction using the standard algorithm

hints: On the number line, we start at $921$ and move **left** $\purpleD{200}$, then $\blueE{70}$, and finally $\maroonD{8}$ more.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which expression has been solved with the following number line?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/34ed5ed3fc7adf3b5e8f48391822153c3080af04)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
On the number line, we start at $658$ and move **left** $\purpleD{300}$, then $\blueE{40}$, and finally $\maroonD{9}$ more.

We can represent this as $658 -\purpleD{300}-\blueE{40}-\maroonD9$.

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
On the number line, we start at $323$ and move **left** $\purpleC{200}$, then $\greenD{7}$ more.

We can represent this as $323 -\purpleC{200}-\greenD7$.
